reviews.comment:
Excelente para cargar nafta a buen precio! No vayan por Ruta 412 en auto!! Aparece como pavimentada pero es un tramo horrible de 80 km por piedras. Con una chata lo sufris menos, pero es para romper el vehiculo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent for filling up with gas at a good price! Don't drive on Route 412!! It looks paved, but it's a horrible 80 km stretch of rocks. You'll suffer less in a pickup truck, but it'll still wreck your vehicle.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/829312115577397471/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ1cHQ2VmdnRRAB
